title: leiostemon frutescens
intro: Leiostemon frutescens, also known as prickly-leaved bush-pea, is a low-growing shrub native to Australia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Leiostemon frutescens include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. The plant can be prepared as a herbal remedy through infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be applied topically to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
